subtitleNew: Enroll a new agent on the Nexus server.
subtitleRegenerate: New tokens generated. The old ones have been invalidated.
executeHint: Run these commands on the target machine (Linux, root required).
reenrollLabel: Reinstall on a host that was already enrolled
reenrollHint: Tick this if the host has already run a Nexus agent. Adds --reenroll: wipes the leftover identity before enrolling (otherwise the agent stays stuck on the old identity).
autogenDisabledBody: The AGENT_BACKEND_URL environment variable is not configured on the server. The machine was created but you'll need to install the agent manually with this information:
verifySubtitle: Nexus monitors the agent connection in real time.
